source_display: Stitch together a demand network through partnerships
evidence: V said 'We're stitching together a demand network essentially, because I think if we have enough sources of demand, enough partnerships, we can approach our audience'
V said 'the conversation with Alex and the one this morning is almost making me think is the real answer helping people that weren't recruiters take a recruiter commission'

source_display: Offer cap table space to partners who source from Careerspan
evidence: V said 'if I was able to go to 10 companies and say, hey, I'll give you like, space on my cap table if you go with us'

source_display: Position Careerspan as a candidate data API (ZoomInfo for talent)
evidence: V said 'We can totally be an API for, you know, a candidate API of candidates, essentially' and Jatin compared it to 'ZoomInfo for talent'
Jatin said 'just being a data provider is super valuable. Like, kind of like zoom in for people data'

source_display: Qualitative data is the real untapped source in hiring
evidence: V said 'I think as a non technical person, I have a real soft spot for qualitative data. And I think the idea is that qualitative data is the real untapped source of data'

source_display: We can only see 20-30% of eligible talent; the rest is invisible
evidence: V said 'under our current paradigm, we're only able to see, I would argue maybe 20 to 30% of the slice of people that would be eligible'
Jatin pushed back: 'you can't measure agency on a public forum' and 'what you're talking about is like a potential of them being good at AI rather than like an actual evidence'

source_display: Decided not to raise more capital, prefer partnerships or acquisition
evidence: V said 'I don't want to raise money' and 'Why raise and dilute any further? The tech is at this point ready'

target_display: Maintain equity control and avoid dilution
evidence: V said 'Why raise and dilute any further?' indicating desire to preserve ownership
